required_preferences.fact: Skips live online workshops when experiencing migraines; now reviews recordings later in short screen-limited increments as recommended

supersedes.fact: Joins monthly online workshops live — never watches recordings after the fact

required_preferences.fact: Replaces morning yoga with gentle walking or light stretching on migraine days — avoids all yoga or strenuous activity when symptoms are present

supersedes.fact: Starts each workday with a 30-minute yoga and stretching routine — never skips even during deadlines

required_preferences.fact: Plays strategy board games with friends monthly; avoids online gaming entirely
Checks in with his sister twice a week and always volunteers for remote babysitting when she requests
Limits total daily screen time by setting device shutdown alarms and takes extended mid-day breaks away from all electronics as per doctor’s advice
Uses the new proprietary platform exclusively for project coordination and team communication — no longer uses Slack or Asana for primary workflow tasks

persona: A 28-year-old data scientist working remotely for a healthcare startup
